mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D tbieid USING DUAL ON (tbieid.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET BSUN_DWAR_CD = ( SELECT COM_CD_ID FROM ( SELECT COM_CD_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE GRP_CD_ID = #{GRP_CD} AND COM_CD_NM = #{provinceNm} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) WHERE BSUN_DWAR_CD IS NULL WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( UTLINSTT_ID , BSUN_DWAR_CD , RGSN_TS , AMNN_TS ) VALUES ( #{utlinsttId} , ( SELECT COM_CD_ID FROM ( SELECT COM_CD_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D WHERE GRP_CD_ID = #{GRP_CD} AND COM_CD_NM = #{provinceNm} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim_vc.ETNM AS INVM_CMP_BPLC_NM , eim_com.ETNM AS RQST_BPLC_NM
, tbiar.RGSN_TS AS INVM_STTG_DT
, tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.RGSN_TS AS LAST_PGSG_DT
FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_vc ON eim_vc.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_com ON eim_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vcl_vc ON tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vcl_com ON tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID = vcl_com.UTLINSTT_ID
WHERE 1=1
AND vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID IS NOT NULL AND vcl_com.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL
AND (
( (tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_SUGGEST_CODE} OR tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_REQUEST_CODE}) AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 60, 'YYYYMMDD') > TO_CHAR(tbias_end.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') )
OR ( tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{AUDIT_EVALUATE_CODE} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 180, 'YYYYMMDD') > TO_CHAR(tbiar.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') ) )
AND TO_CHAR(tbiar.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') >= #{openDate}
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D WHERE ATRW_STPL_COSN_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(MDPH_SQN), 0) + 1 AS mdphSqn FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_H WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_H ( UTLINSTT_ID , MDPH_SQN , BNNM , ENPR_DSNC_CD , BZN , COL , RPRNM , EMP_CNT , BTNM , CGN , CNPL , HMPG_URL_ADR , ADR , ZPCD , CPFN_AMT , PVPR_AMT , TTIS_STCNT , ACPR , ETVL_AMT , INVM_MNY_USUS , INVM_RTRV_PLAN_CON , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) SELECT #{utlinsttId} , #{mdphSqn} , BNNM , ENPR_DSNC_CD , BZN , COL , RPRNM , EMP_CNT , BTNM , CGN , CNPL , HMPG_URL_ADR , ADR , ZPCD , CPFN_AMT , PVPR_AMT , TTIS_STCNT , ACPR , ETVL_AMT , INVM_MNY_USUS , INVM_RTRV_PLAN_CON , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT NVL(MAX(MDPH_SQN), 0) + 1 AS mdphSqn FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_F_FNAM_H WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_IR_F_FNAM_H ( UTLINSTT_ID , MDPH_SQN , FLAS_AMT , NONE_FLAS_AMT , LBLT_TTSM_AMT , CPTS_TTSM_AMT , QCKAS_AMT , INAS_AMT , ETC_FLAS_AMT , IVAS_AMT , TGAS_AMT , ITAS_AMT , ETC_NONE_FLAS_AMT , CRLB_AMT , NONE_CRLB_AMT , CPFN_AMT , CPSP_MNY_AMT , CPCR_AMT , ETC_INLV_PL_CTAM , ERNSP_AMT , AMSL_AMT , AMPM_AMT , SLTP_AMT , SACST_AMT , OPPR_AMT , NNOE_AMT , NONOP_EXP_AMT , ORPF_AMT , CRTX_AMT , CTNP_AMT , AST_TTSM_AMT , LBLT_CPTS_TTSM , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) SELECT #{utlinsttId} , #{mdphSqn} , FLAS_AMT , NONE_FLAS_AMT , LBLT_TTSM_AMT , CPTS_TTSM_AMT , QCKAS_AMT , INAS_AMT , ETC_FLAS_AMT , IVAS_AMT , TGAS_AMT , ITAS_AMT , ETC_NONE_FLAS_AMT , CRLB_AMT , NONE_CRLB_AMT , CPFN_AMT , CPSP_MNY_AMT , CPCR_AMT , ETC_INLV_PL_CTAM , ERNSP_AMT , AMSL_AMT , AMPM_AMT , SLTP_AMT , SACST_AMT , OPPR_AMT , NNOE_AMT , NONOP_EXP_AMT , ORPF_AMT , CRTX_AMT , CTNP_AMT , AST_TTSM_AMT , LBLT_CPTS_TTSM , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_F_FNAM_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
